description.value:
An advanced battle technique achieved by blending the techniques of Taijutsu and Ninjutsu together, driving elemental power into one's arms and legs that can be controlled and fired. This jutsu should only be cast whilst unarmored, as its casting will destroy any armor that you are currently wearing. You cannot lose concentration on this jutsu while conscious unless you are Incapacitated or cannot pay its concentration cost if it requires one to be maintained.

When you first learn this jutsu, select one elemental nature release keyword you have access to. If you do not have access to any, you can choose to make this selection if you ever were to obtain one. This selection cannot be changed later.

This jutsu can gain the nature release keyword you chose when cast, and for the duration you can cast jutsu with that nature release keyword using your Taijutsu Ability Modifier.

This jutsu can be cast with 0 movement, and if you are Grappled or Restrained when you cast it, the condition(s) immediately end as a part of this jutsu's casting. When you cast this jutsu, all creatures of your choice within 10 feet of you must make a Dexterity Saving Throw, taking Xd6 Force damage on a failure or half as much on a success.
(X = your Taijutsu Ability Modifier)

Additionally, this jutsu grants you the following benefits for its duration, some of which depend on the nature release keyword this jutsu possesses:

  • You can calculate your AC as 14 + your Proficiency Bonus + your base Taijutsu Ability Modifier.
  • You gain Resistance to Force damage, as well as the damage type of the nature release keyword this jutsu possesses, if any.
  • Once per turn, you can Dash at no action economy cost.
  • Your Taijutsu and Bukijutsu that use weapons with the Unarmed property increase their damage die by one step, to a maximum of a d12.

  • If you are unable to cast jutsu with the M component, when you would cast a jutsu you can pay chakra equal to the rank of the jutsu to treat it casting as if your speed was not hindered, once per round.
    (D/C-Rank: 6; B/A-Rank: 9; S-Rank: 12)

  • Jutsu you cast with the HS or CS component that use your Taijutsu Ability Modifier can replace those components with the M component or add the M component.

At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the radius of the initial explosion by 5 feet, and the damage die of the initial explosion by one step. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, jutsu with the M component treat Immunity to conditions they apply as Resistance. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, jutsu with the M component cannot have their damage reduced below half and cannot be negated or interrupted when cast.
